title: hieracium pseudosvaneticum subsp. tschkhubianischwilii
intro: Hieracium pseudosvaneticum subsp. tschkhubianischwilii is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, commonly known as hawkweed, a type of flowering plant. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is used for its health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Hieracium pseudosvaneticum subsp. tschkhubianischwilii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
